##LOCALITY=White Canyon district, San Juan County, Utah, USA
##OWNER=Natural History Museum of Los Angeles
##SOURCE=Tony Kampf
##DESCRIPTION=Secondary phase on granular quartz matrix of transparent, light green yellow, poorly formed blades or prisms, in association with various combinations of deliensite, gypsum, natrozippeite, rietveldite and shumwayite. Type sample, described in Kampf et al (2022)
